mission.title: Install and Configure Koordinator on Kubernetes
mission.description: Koordinator is a QoS-based scheduling system designed to optimize the layout and status of workloads in Kubernetes, enhancing resource utilization and performance. Installing Koordinator allows you to improve the management of microservices, web services, and batch jobs in your Kubernetes cluster.

steps.title: Add the Koordinator Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official Koordinator Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration.
```bash
helm repo add koordinator https://charts.koordinator.sh
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Koordinator using Helm
steps.description:
Install Koordinator in the `koordinator-system` namespace, creating it if it doesn't exist.
```bash
helm install koordinator koordinator/koordinator --namespace koordinator-system --create-namespace --version v1.7.0
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the Koordinator pods are running successfully in the `koordinator-system` namespace.
```bash
kubectl get pods -n koordinator-system
```

steps.title: Configure resource limits for Koordinator
steps.description:
Apply resource limits to the Koordinator deployment to ensure optimal performance.
```bash
kubectl patch deployment koordinator -n koordinator-system --type='json' -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/resources", "value": {"limits": {"cpu": "500m", "memory": "512Mi"}, "requests": {"cpu": "250m", "memory": "256Mi"}}}]'
```

steps.title: Set up RBAC for Koordinator
steps.description:
Ensure that the necessary RBAC permissions are granted for Koordinator to function properly.
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koordinator-sh/koordinator/main/deploy/rbac.yaml
```

uninstall.title: Remove the Helm release
uninstall.description:
Uninstall the Koordinator release from your cluster.
```bash
helm uninstall koordinator --namespace koordinator-system
```

uninstall.title: Clean up CRDs
uninstall.description:
Delete the Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) created by Koordinator.
```bash
kubectl delete crd $(kubectl get crd | grep koordinator.sh | awk '{print $1}')
```

uninstall.title: Remove the Koordinator namespace
uninstall.description:
Delete the `koordinator-system` namespace to clean up any remaining resources.
```bash
kubectl delete namespace koordinator-system
```

upgrade.title: Backup current state
upgrade.description:
Export the current configuration and state of Koordinator before upgrading.
```bash
kubectl get all -n koordinator-system -o yaml > koordinator-backup.yaml
```

upgrade.title: Update the Helm repository
upgrade.description:
Ensure that your Helm repository is up to date with the latest charts.
```bash
helm repo update
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade Koordinator
upgrade.description:
Upgrade your existing Koordinator installation to the latest version.
```bash
helm upgrade koordinator koordinator/koordinator --namespace koordinator-system --version v1.7.0
```

upgrade.title: Verify the upgrade
upgrade.description:
Check the status of the Koordinator pods to ensure they are running the new version.
```bash
kubectl get pods -n koordinator-system
```

troubleshooting.title: Pods stuck in Pending state
troubleshooting.description:
If Koordinator pods are stuck in Pending, check for resource availability in the cluster.
```bash
kubectl describe pod <pod-name> -n koordinator-system
```

troubleshooting.title: Koordinator service not reachable
troubleshooting.description:
If the Koordinator service is not reachable, verify the service configuration and endpoints.
```bash
kubectl get svc -n koordinator-system
kubectl describe svc koordinator -n koordinator-system
```

troubleshooting.title: High CPU usage in Koordinator pods
troubleshooting.description:
If you notice high CPU usage, check the resource limits and requests configured for the Koordinator deployment.
```bash
kubectl top pods -n koordinator-system
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Koordinator will have all pods running in the `koordinator-system` namespace, and you will be able to access its services. Resource limits and RBAC configurations will be applied correctly, ensuring optimal performance.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add koordinator https://charts.koordinator.sh
helm repo update
helm install koordinator koordinator/koordinator --namespace koordinator-system --create-namespace --version v1.7.0

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running version 1.24 or higher, and have Helm and kubectl installed.
